summary: Matrix recording of an enjoyable 1984 show featuring a standout Slipknot! and the occasional Big Railroad Blues, though reviewers give little detail on audio fidelity.
review: Both reviewers recall the concert fondly – one reminisces about the era and highlights any performance that includes "Big Railroad Blues," while the other points out an interesting Jack Straw placement and calls Slipknot! a highlight. No specific comments were made about the sound quality, leaving the technical assessment uncertain beyond the matrix source indicated by the filename.

ai_rating.rationale: Average star rating (3‑4) and generally positive remarks about song highlights, but lack of concrete audio quality comments limits certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not discuss clarity, balance, or any glitches; assessment is based solely on the matrix source indicated by the file name.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed commentary on pacing or set structure was provided.
